changes.before: Late sun over the harvested fields. Orchard rows climbed the low rises in dark green bands. Wagons groaned north under sacks and household trunks...
changes.after: Late sun over harvested fields. Orchard rows on the low rises. Wagons groaning north under sacks and trunks...

changes.before: Jaina kept one stack ready for the road... Under it sat the room. The chalkboard. The cold cup...
changes.after: Jaina kept the usable stack ready... Under that sat the room. The board. The cup gone cold...

changes.before: The treated grain survives the road, the granary, the oven. People eat it and keep eating it... Death lets it answer.
changes.after: The treated grain survives the road, the granary, the oven... When the sickness turns obvious, death stops ending the process.

changes.before: He built it in layers. That's why the first reads kept catching only the shell... until it has time to take hold.
changes.after: He built it in layers. That's why the first reads kept catching only the shell. The grain screamed. The deeper part stayed quiet until it had time to take hold.

changes.before: Did you. There were drawers of hands. A room of bodies still breathing on tables. Another with parts sorted into crates.
changes.after: Did you. There were drawers of hands. Bodies still breathing on tables. Parts sorted into crates.

changes.before: He built a higher version for himself. Most dead rise crude. Herd-pulled. Enough for motion and command...
changes.after: He built a higher version for himself. Most dead rise crude. Herd-pulled. Enough for motion and command...

changes.before: She had chosen the omission hours ago in the sanctum and again on the island and again when the road began. Each time keeping it back got harder.
changes.after: Jaina had chosen the omission in the sanctum, on the island, and again when the road began. Each mile made it harder to keep the room boxed.

changes.before: The Convocation has issued formal recall... There is more pressure behind this than there was yesterday...
changes.after: The Convocation has issued formal recall... There is more pressure behind this than yesterday...

changes.before: Kel'Thuzad confirmed the plague is part of a larger invasion... There is another power above him still, called the Burning Legion.
changes.after: Kel'Thuzad confirmed the plague is part of a larger invasion... There is another power above him still, called the Burning Legion.

changes.before: If I ride north now... there may still be a chance to use part of it before Stratholme starts proving me right.
changes.after: If I ride north now, I bring you a theory and leave the south to burn with it. If I keep riding, there may still be a chance to use part of it before Stratholme starts proving me right.

changes.before: Cyndia moved first... Jaina's own mare bunched under her as she caught the reins short.
changes.after: Cyndia moved first... Jaina caught her own reins short as a rider burst out of the lane...

changes.before: The feed points... Anything where the outer shell still sits in enough quantity to break before it disappears into bodies.
changes.after: The feed points. Granaries first... Anywhere the outer shell still sits in enough quantity to break before it disappears into bodies.

changes.before: Good. That's a road answer. Her heart kicked once, wrong-footed by the approval, and settled again.
changes.after: Good. That's a road answer. Approval hit Jaina crookedly enough to feel like pain before it settled.

flags: Line 133: kept the formal recall diction because Lor'themar is relaying an official order, not speaking casually.
Line 55: kept one 'as if' accusation in Sylvanas dialogue; it reads as a spoken barb, not narration fog.
Line 227: kept Antonidas's soft 'I know' exactly plain; any ornament would weaken the beat.

observations: Word count dropped from 3066 to 2167, a 29.3% cut.
The opening lost scenic drag and kept only field traffic, chalk residue, and formation spacing.
Jaina's usable-stack / room-stack split now lands once instead of echoing through multiple internal restatements.
The shell-mechanism explanation still exists, but the duplicated phrasing around grain, spread, and death was compressed.
The Jandice route exchange lost filler beats and kept only the accusation that matters.
Lor'themar's call now turns faster from order to refusal; the road never stalls for bureaucratic summary.
Antonidas's call keeps the emotional pressure but drops repeated mentor-memory restatements and bridge lines.
The relay-rider interruption keeps the panic, mud, and smoke while trimming mounted choreography.
The closing page no longer repeats the southward push in multiple paraphrases; it ends on one clean road image.
Filter words finished at 0; the final pass removed the lone remaining 'she heard' construction.
'just' fell from 2 to 0.
'like' similes fell from 2 to 1; the remaining spark comparison earns its place as a touch-beat.
'something' fell from 4 to 1; the surviving instance is the idiomatic 'do something with it' in live dialogue, not narration-fog or vague intensifier prose.
ly-adverbs fell from 19 to 14 without flattening the voice.
Started/began forms fell from 3 to 2; the remaining uses are temporal and not padding the prose.
No planning-vocabulary leaks, elegant-variation labels, clinical anatomy, or academic-discipline metaphors survived the pass.
The repeated omission language around the room was compressed into concrete pressure instead of narrator explanation.
Approval, shame, and dread now land through body reaction and withheld speech rather than commentary about commentary.
Meta-audit re-read the densest blocks at lines 33-41, 167-191, and 283-301 word by word; no new hitlist pattern slipped in during compression.
Jaina's field speech stays precise but avoids memo diction; she sounds like a mage on horseback, not a paper.
Sylvanas's questions stay clipped and tactical; she never drifts into bureaucratic phrasing.
Lor'themar's official language is limited to the quoted recall order and remains justified by context.
Antonidas sounds like a worried teacher and archmage together, not a council clerk.
The relay rider sounds exhausted and half-singed, not polished.
The Stratholme planning beat now uses grounded nouns: granaries, bakehouses, yards, stock, fire.
The exchange around Kel'Thuzad's schoolroom keeps accusation and shame without turning either speaker clinical.
The surviving 'road answer' line reads as Sylvanas's voice, not an editor's label.
No spoken line uses the zero-tolerance words from the dialogue-register contamination list.
